item.text: I’ll play Zap for tempo, finish the low-health guardian with the marksman, and spend the supply lead on fresh raiders while advancing the existing raider back toward the fight.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-009.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-009\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-009.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-009.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-009.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-009\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-009-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-009-2\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":11,\"row\":0}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"target\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-009.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-009.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-009.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-009.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-009.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Zap, killed P2'"'s damaged guardian, advanced the existing raider, and recruited two more raiders.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: keep pressure with Zap, remove the weakened guardian cleanly, convert the large supply lead into immediate board bodies, and move the active raider toward the center fight.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-009.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-009.board.result.json"'

/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail

cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-009.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-009\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-009.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-009.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-009.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-009\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-009-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-009-2\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":11,\"row\":0}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"target\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-009.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-009.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-009.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-009.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-009.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Zap, killed P2'"'s damaged guardian, advanced the existing raider, and recruited two more raiders.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: keep pressure with Zap, remove the weakened guardian cleanly, convert the large supply lead into immediate board bodies, and move the active raider toward the center fight.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-009.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-009.board.result.json"'

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-009`.

Deck line: played `zap`, moved to buy, ended turn. Bought nothing. Produced `6` money and `1` damage.

Board line: moved `P1-raider-turn-007-1` to `(8,3)`, recruited two raiders at `(10,1)` and `(11,0)`, and `P1-marksman-start-4` removed `P2-guardian-start-3`.

Rationale: this preserves rush tempo, removes P2’s key blocker, and converts P1’s supply lead into immediate board pressure. Strict validation passed.
